title: Code review: fix inconsistencies and remove dead code

requirements.text: Audit backend/main.mo for unused variables, dead code, redundant imports, unreachable branches, and stale comments. Remove or clean up anything that is no longer needed without changing observable behaviour.

quotes: Revise o codigo... busque inconsistencies. Limpe dados desnecessários

acceptanceCriteria: No unused let/var bindings remain in main.mo
No dead or unreachable code blocks remain
Stale or misleading comments are removed or corrected
All existing public functions still compile and behave identically

requirements.text: Audit backend/migration.mo for relevance. If it only resets lastMidPrice and that field no longer exists or the reset is no longer necessary, simplify or remove the file accordingly.
acceptanceCriteria: migration.mo contains only logic that is still relevant to the current stable state shape
If migration.mo is empty or trivially a no-op it is reduced to a minimal stub

requirements.text: Audit all frontend source files (excluding immutable paths) for unused imports, unused state variables, dead components, duplicate logic, and inconsistent naming conventions. Remove or reconcile anything that is not referenced or is contradictory.

quotes: Revise o codigo... busque inconsistencies. Limpe dados desnecessários

acceptanceCriteria: No unused React imports or variables remain across components and hooks
No component or hook file is imported but never used
Naming conventions are consistent (camelCase for variables/functions, PascalCase for components)
No duplicate query keys or redundant fetch logic in useQueries.ts
All existing UI panels render correctly after cleanup

constraints: Do not change any public backend API signatures — existing query/update method names and parameter types must remain identical
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not introduce new features — this is a cleanup pass only
nonGoals: Adding the depositCkBTC backend function (deferred due to repeated build failures)
Adding a deposit button on the dashboard
Modifying canister IDs or network configuration
